title: Is it possible to share files with external parties via the files view?
excerpt: Hi! I’m wondering if it would be possible to use Monday.com like a digital asset manager using the files view. My goal would be to click a file or multiple files, and share them with an external party via link or similar…

posts.author: mkingsland (Morgan Kingsland)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! I’m wondering if it would be possible to use Monday.com like a digital asset manager using the files view. My goal would be to click a file or multiple files, and share them with an external party via link or similar? I’m feeling like this not possible but wanted to ask! Thanks!
